summary: Matched and linked the menu bonus info translation unit `src/melee/mn/mninfobonus.c`. The C diff is small but targeted: it introduced `textSize` and `textSetup` helpers around `HSD_SisLib` text creation, adjusted some literal/flag spellings in the model/GObj setup path, switched `mninfobonus.c` from `NonMatching` to `Matching` in `configure.py`, and updated GALE01 symbols to reflect local compiler-style data/sdata2 labels. The decomp.dev bot reported +2188 linked code bytes, +1240 matched data bytes, +1344 linked data bytes, and two new full matches for `main/melee/mn/mninfobonus` `.sdata2` and `.data`.

key_files.role: Refactored helper boundaries and constants to make the `mninfobonus` object match.
Updated `.data`, `.bss`, and `.sdata2` symbols after the object/data match, including local `@` constants and `...data.0`/`...bss.0` labels.

what_changed: `mnInfoBonus_80252F8C` now calls a new static `textSetup(struct mnInfoBonus_804A09B0_t* o)` helper instead of performing `HSD_SisLib_803A5ACC`, font-size assignment, and `HSD_SisLib_803A6368` directly in the function body.

Added `inline void textSize(HSD_Text* text)`, setting `text->font_size.x` and `.y` to `0.0521F`; removed the older inline helper named `mnInfoBonus_80252F8C_inline1` that performed the same font-size writes.
In `mnInfoBonus_80252F8C_inline0`, unsigned-suffixed integer literals such as `6U`, `7U`, `4U`, and `0U` were changed to plain integer literals.
Replaced `0x10U` arguments to `HSD_JObjSetFlags` with the named flag `JOBJ_HIDDEN` when hiding child/next JObjs.
`config/GALE01/symbols.txt` shrank `mnInfoBonus_803EFCE8` from size `0x480` to `0x404` and split out local `.data` string symbols `@332` through `@335`.
`symbols.txt` added local `...data.0` and `...bss.0` labels at the starts of the relevant mnInfoBonus data and BSS regions.

`symbols.txt` replaced a run of global `mnInfoBonus_804DC268` through `mnInfoBonus_804DC2B8` `.sdata2` constants with local compiler-style `@146`, `@147`, `@148`, `@149`, `@150`, `@151`, `@224` through `@234`, `@236`, and `@336` labels.
smart_moves: Factored the text object creation/configuration into `textSetup`, leaving `mnInfoBonus_80252F8C` with a simpler call shape. The PR does not document the exact compiler reason, but the before/after diff and match report show this helper-boundary change was part of the successful match.

Kept the font-size assignment as a tiny inline helper (`textSize`) instead of a large address-named inline helper, preserving the exact repeated stores while making the source less tied to one function name.
Used `JOBJ_HIDDEN` for the JObj hide flag instead of a raw `0x10U`, improving semantic readability while preserving the intended flag operation.
Updated the symbol map alongside the C match, converting previously broad/global mnInfoBonus constants into local `@` symbols and labels consistent with matched compiler output.
Only after the object matched, flipped the build configuration to `Object(Matching, ...)`, ensuring the linked-code gain was captured by the build system.
decomp_lessons: Small helper extraction can be enough to resolve stubborn menu-object matches, especially around text setup and library calls such as `HSD_SisLib_803A5ACC`/`HSD_SisLib_803A6368`.

When an object becomes matching, revisit `symbols.txt`: broad global address-named constants may need to become local compiler-generated `@NNN` labels, and data object sizes may shrink when strings/constants are split out accurately.
Literal spellings and enum names are worth trying during match work. Here, plain integer literals and `JOBJ_HIDDEN` replaced unsigned-suffixed magic constants in the final matching version.
A successful code match can also unlock data-section completion; the bot reported `main/melee/mn/mninfobonus` `.sdata2` moving from 68.29% to 100.00% and `.data` from 99.70% to 100.00%.

For menu modules using HSD GObjs/JObjs, keep setup order exact: create GObj, load JObj from `StaticModelDesc`, attach object, setup GX link, add/request animation, set flags, then attach the GObj process.
naming_conventions: Existing decomp symbols retain the module/address style, e.g. `mnInfoBonus_802528F8`, `mnInfoBonus_80252F8C`, and `mnInfoBonus_804A09B0_t`.
New source helpers used descriptive camelCase names, `textSize` and `textSetup`, rather than address-derived names.
Matched local data constants in `symbols.txt` use compiler-style `@NNN` labels such as `@146`, `@236`, and `@336` instead of global `mnInfoBonus_804DCxxx` names.
Local section anchor labels appear as `...data.0` and `...bss.0`.
Named flags such as `JOBJ_HIDDEN` are preferable to raw flag constants when they still match.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Changed helper boundaries around text setup: `mnInfoBonus_80252F8C` now delegates `HSD_SisLib_803A5ACC`, font-size writes, and `HSD_SisLib_803A6368` to `textSetup`.
Removed unsigned suffixes from several GObj/JObj call arguments: `GObj_Create(6, 7, 0x80)`, `GObj_SetupGXLink(..., 4, 0x80)`, and `HSD_GObjProc_8038FD54(..., 0)`.
Used `JOBJ_HIDDEN` in `HSD_JObjSetFlags` calls to represent the hide bit.
Updated `configure.py` from `Object(NonMatching, "melee/mn/mninfobonus.c")` to `Object(Matching, "melee/mn/mninfobonus.c")` after the match.
Reclassified `.sdata2` constants from named globals to local `@` symbols, indicating the final object emitted local constants rather than externally meaningful globals.
Adjusted the `.data` symbol span for `mnInfoBonus_803EFCE8` from `0x480` to `0x404` and split following strings into separate local symbols.
review_feedback: No human review comments were present in the PR slice.
decomp-dev[bot] reported GALE01 linked code at 31.91% with +0.06% / +2188 bytes.
decomp-dev[bot] reported matched data at 34.70% with +0.10% / +1240 bytes and linked data at 29.30% with +0.11% / +1344 bytes.
decomp-dev[bot] listed 2 new matches for `main/melee/mn/mninfobonus`: `.sdata2` +28 bytes, 68.29% to 100.00%, and `.data` +4 bytes, 99.70% to 100.00%.
follow_up_queries: Find other `melee/mn/*.c` files still marked `NonMatching` that call `HSD_SisLib_803A5ACC` or perform text font-size setup inline.
Search for remaining raw `0x10U` JObj hide flags that could be expressed as `JOBJ_HIDDEN` without breaking matches.
Compare other menu module symbol maps for broad `mn*_*` `.sdata2` globals that should become local `@NNN` constants after matching.
Review whether helper extraction like `textSetup` improves matches in `mninfo.c`, `mnsnap.c`, or `mngallery.c`.
